title: Anak Titipan Setan
overview: Eyang Susana made a gift agreement with a demon named 'Jaran Penoleh'. The agreement made her have to prepare sacrifices in the form of 10 year old children to the devil. If can't, then Eyang Susana's life will be at stake.
